evidence.snippet: We engineer and manufacture our Wave Relay® MANET and Cloud Relay™ technology to transmit voice, video, and situational awareness in contested and congested environments. Through the Wave Relay® Ecosystem, an alliance of industry-leading companies, Persistent unites warfighters, UGVs, UAVs, sensors, cameras, and devices on a common network.

Persistent Systems offers ready-to-integrate solutions to provide reliable connectivity, bidirectional video transmission, and edge computing power for UAS platforms of all sizes in congested and contested RF environments.

items.notes: Core product line is Wave Relay MANET radios, data links, and mesh networking hardware for military and UAS platforms.

evidence.snippet:
### GCS SOLUTIONS FOR ANY MISSION
Persistent offers fixed and steerable GCS solutions to provide long range & reliable connectivity in both land and sea operations.
 [![Integrated Antenna Series](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/images/solutions/integrated-tracker.svg)](https://persistentsystems.com/integrated-antenna/)[![Multi-Band Tracking Antenna](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/images/solutions/landgcs-icon.webp)](https://persistentsystems.com/tracking-antenna/)

items.notes: Offers fixed and steerable GCS solutions (Multi-Band Tracking Antenna, Integrated Antenna Series) for UAS ground control.

### OFF-THE-SHELF & READY TO INTEGRATE
Persistent offers off-the-shelf solutions
designed to transform your UAS platform
into a networked asset.
 [![Embedded Module](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/images/solutions/embedded_module.webp)](https://persistentsystems.com/embedded-module/)[![MPU5](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/images/solutions/mpu_5.svg) ](https://persistentsystems.com/mpu5/)[![RF Module](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/images/solutions/rf_module.svg)](https://persistentsystems.com/radio-modules/)

### 2017
Persistent Systems launched the [Wave Relay Ecosystem](https://persistentsystems.com/ecosystem-overview/) to empower warfighters with robots, sensors, and cameras that use a common network. We launched the Embedded Module to give manufacturers the ability to integrated the Wave Relay MANET directly into their platforms.
[Learn more about the Embedded Module](https://persistentsystems.com/embedded-module/)

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells Wave Relay data link subsystems (Embedded Module, RF Module, tracking antennas, GCS components) purpose-built for integration into UAS, UGV, and manned platforms.

evidence.snippet:
The MPU5 - the world’s first smart radio – was launched. The goal was to revolutionize the MANET world by introducing a high-throughput radio designed to be a battlefield-ready networking device.
[Learn more about MPU5](https://persistentsystems.com/mpu5/)

items.name: Embedded Module

evidence.snippet:
### 2017
Persistent Systems launched the [Wave Relay Ecosystem](https://persistentsystems.com/ecosystem-overview/) to empower warfighters with robots, sensors, and cameras that use a common network. We launched the Embedded Module to give manufacturers the ability to integrated the Wave Relay MANET directly into their platforms.

*   [GVR5](https://persistentsystems.com/gvr5/)
*   [RDC](https://persistentsystems.com/rugged-display-controller/)

PT5
===
PERSONAL TRANSPORT 5
The PT5 is a dual-function Personal Transport for the MPU5 that simultaneously connects you and your team to the cloud via 5G and connects your devices to your MPU5 via Wi-Fi.
[Learn More](https://persistentsystems.com/pt5)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A: Use a Multi-Band Tracking antenna for a long range (130 mile) single aircraft application. Use one or multiple Integrated Sector Antennas to blanket an area with Wave Relay coverage for shipborne or swarming applications. Integrated Sector Antennas allow you to communicate with multiple aircraft from a single location.
*   [Integrated Antenna Series](https://persistentsystems.com/integrated-antenna/)
*   [Dual Push TO TALK (PTT)](https://persistentsystems.com/ptt-overview/)
*   [AWRS](https://persistentsystems.com/wp-content/themes/persistensystems/pdf/03EN487_AWRS_Spec_Sheet_Rev._E.pdf)

Cloud Relay provides seamless Ethernet connectivity to users located anywhere in the world by any means necessary. Cloud Relay’s simplified Hub and Spoke architecture augments your existing network infrastructure.

evidence.snippet: Persistent offers non-ITAR, commercial solutions on the NIAP Product Compliant List and NSA CSfC Component List for military, public safety, and commercial applications.

ndaa.notes: Site claims non-ITAR status and lists NIAP/NSA CSfC/FIPS/Common Criteria certifications, but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim.

tagline: Manufactures Wave Relay® MANET radios and networked communications subsystems (MPU5, Embedded Module, GVR5, antennas, Cloud Relay) for dismount, UAS, UGV, and manned-aircraft platforms. Blue UAS certified; FAA STC-certified airborne LRU (AWRS). Public evidence of production-ready tactical and platform-integration products is strong, though NDAA compliance status is not documented.
